seo.title: Makeup Mantra Luxury Salon | Hair • Nails • Makeup
seo.description: Lumière Beauty & Salon offers premium hair, skin, nail, and spa services. Experience luxury beauty treatments in an elegant, welcoming environment.
seo.ogDescription: Premium beauty services — hair, skin, nails, spa, bridal and more. Book your appointment today.

name: Makeup Mantra Luxury Salon

hero.title: Our Beauty Center
hero.subtitle: Experience the art of transformation
hero.description: Step into a world of refined beauty where every detail is crafted with precision. We blend timeless elegance with modern techniques to reveal your most luminous self.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: A Legacy of Beauty & Craftsmanship
about.history: Founded in 2015 by internationally trained stylist Sophia Laurent, Lumière was born from a vision — to create a sanctuary where artistry and self-care converge. What began as a boutique hair studio has grown into one of the city's most celebrated full-service beauty destinations.
about.philosophy: We believe beauty is a form of expression, not perfection. Our team of certified specialists brings warmth, expertise, and creative precision to every appointment. We use only the finest luxury products to ensure your look lasts as long as your confidence does.
about.mission: To elevate everyday beauty rituals into moments of genuine joy and self-discovery.

values.title: Artistry
values.description: Every service is a creative expression tailored to you.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: Honest consultations, transparent pricing, genuine care.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: Continuous training and only the finest luxury products.

values.title: Wellness
values.description: Your comfort and wellbeing guide every decision we make.

owner.name: Sophia Laurent
owner.title: Founder & Master Stylist
owner.bio: With over 15 years of experience and training across Paris, New York, and Milan, Sophia brings a global perspective to every look. Her signature approach blends European precision with individual expression.

team.name: Sophia Laurent
team.title: Master Stylist & Founder
team.bio: Trained in Paris and New York. Expert in transformative color and precision cutting techniques.

team.name: Elena Vasquez
team.title: Senior Colorist
team.bio: Color specialist with expertise in dimensional color and creative transformations.

team.name: Mia Chen
team.title: Skincare Specialist
team.bio: CIDESCO certified esthetician specializing in advanced skin treatments and anti-aging protocols.

team.name: Isabelle Moreau
team.title: Nail Artist
team.bio: Creative nail artist known for intricate designs and long-lasting nail enhancements.

services.title: Hair Styling
services.description: From precision cuts to avant-garde color work, our hair team transforms your vision into reality with master-level technique.

subServices.name: Haircut + Hair Wash + Blow Dry
subServices.description: This service provides a complete grooming experience for men, including a professional haircut, a refreshing hair wash, and a stylish blow-dry. The haircut is tailored to the clients preferences and facial features, ensuring a personalized and flattering look. The hair wash includes a gentle scalp massage and the use of high-quality shampoo and conditioner to cleanse and nourish the hair. The blow-dry adds the finishing touch, giving the hair a polished and well-groomed appearance. This service is perfect for men looking to maintain a neat and stylish hairstyle with the convenience of all-in-one grooming.

subServices.name: Blow Dry & Style
subServices.description: Expert blowout for silky, voluminous results.

subServices.name: Balayage
subServices.description: Sun-kissed natural color with seamless, freehand technique.

subServices.description: Complete color transformation from root to tip.

testimonials.name: Amelia Hartwell
testimonials.review: Lumière is simply the best salon I have ever been to. Sophia transformed my hair with a balayage that looked straight out of a magazine. The ambiance is so calming, the team so professional. I am a client for life.

testimonials.name: Michelle Ortiz
testimonials.review: I trusted Lumière with my wedding day look and they delivered beyond my wildest dreams. The bridal makeup was ethereal, the hair styling flawless. My husband was speechless. I cannot recommend them enough.

testimonials.name: Priya Nair
testimonials.review: As someone who is very particular about skincare, finding Mia at Lumière was a game changer. Her facials are unlike anything I have experienced — the results speak for themselves. My skin has never looked better.

testimonials.name: Grace Summers
testimonials.review: The Keratin Treatment was worth every penny. Elena is a true master at her craft. Not only did she fix years of damage, she gave me hair I never thought possible. The salon experience itself is pure luxury.

hours.note: Walk-ins welcome based on availability. Booking in advance is highly recommended to secure your preferred time and stylist.

images.caption: Bold eye makeup editorial look
images.alt: Editorial eye makeup with bold colors

booking.title: Reserve Your Experience
booking.subtitle: Choose your services and preferred time below
booking.depositPolicy: A 25% deposit is required to secure your appointment. This will be applied toward your final service total.
booking.cancellationPolicy: Cancellations made less than 24 hours before your appointment may be subject to a cancellation fee of 50% of the service cost.
booking.noShowPolicy: No-shows will be charged 100% of the booked service cost.
booking.confirmationNote: You will receive a confirmation via email and SMS within 30 minutes of booking.
booking.stylistNote: Preferred stylist requests are accommodated based on availability.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: We would love to hear from you
contact.fullAddress: 142 Rue de la Paix, Suite 3A, Beverly Hills, CA 90210
contact.landmarks: Located near the corner of Wilshire Boulevard and Rodeo Drive. Validated parking available in the adjacent building.
contact.parking: Free validated parking for clients in the building's underground garage (Level B1).
contact.accessibility: Wheelchair accessible entrance and restrooms. Please contact us in advance for any special accommodations.

amenities.title: Complimentary Beverages
amenities.description: Enjoy a selection of teas, coffee, and sparkling water during your visit.

amenities.title: Free WiFi
amenities.description: High-speed WiFi available throughout the salon.

amenities.title: Validated Parking
amenities.description: Free underground parking for all clients.

amenities.title: Card Payments
amenities.description: We accept all major credit and debit cards.

hygiene: All tools and equipment are fully sterilized between clients. We follow strict salon hygiene protocols in compliance with state board regulations.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.answer: We recommend booking at least 3–5 days in advance to secure your preferred time slot and stylist. For bridal or large group bookings, 4–6 weeks advance notice is ideal.

faqs.question: Do you offer consultations?
faqs.answer: Yes. Complimentary consultations are available for color services, hair treatments, and skin care. Contact us to schedule yours.

faqs.question: What products do you use?
faqs.answer: We exclusively use professional-grade, luxury products from L'Oréal Professionnel, Wella, Kérastase, NARS, and Dermalogica.

faqs.question: Is there a deposit required?
faqs.answer: Yes. A 25% deposit is required at the time of booking to secure your appointment. This is applied to your service total on the day.
